notes: Case 2011-16 is a duplicate of Case 2011-15 (Mr. Stephen Hahn v. Philadelphia Metro West Presbytery). Both cases involve the same complainant and arose from substantially identical facts. Case 2011-16 was filed as a separate complaint but was determined by the SJC to be identical to 2011-15 and was not separately decided. The actual decision in this group of cases addresses Hahn's complaints against PMWP and subsequent charges brought against Hahn by PMWP, resulting in a judgment of censure and indefinite suspension from the sacraments.
